chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D–1189 of 2023 (Aamir Khan Vs. P.O Sindh & others) [ Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on o/objection (at flag-A). 2..For Hearing of main case. - 21-02-2024. Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Abro Assistant A.G. - At the very out-set, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant petition before this Court on merits provided the petitioner is permitted to seek his appointment with the respondents on merits in accordance with law by making such application, whenever the posts are advertised by them formally, which is not opposed by the learned Assistant A.G for the State. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Akber.
